steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence describes a process (OSL analysis) and then states its result. The transition must signal that what follows is the final conclusion of that process.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Similarly,: introduces a parallel, not a conclusion. ✗
  • Choice B — Ultimately,: signals the final outcome after a process — exactly what ‘OSL dating indicated’ represents. ✓
  • Choice C — In addition,: adds information rather than concluding it. ✗
  • Choice D — By comparison,: requires a contrast with something else, which isn't present here. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
